CVE-2021-23413.summary: This affects the package jszip before 3.7.0. Crafting a new zip file with filenames set to Object prototype values (e.g __proto__, toString, etc) results in a returned object with a modified prototype instance.

CVE-2022-48285.summary: loadAsync in JSZip before 3.8.0 allows Directory Traversal via a crafted ZIP archive.
